mapper.sql: SELECT id, project_id, issue_id, event_id, issue_type, fingerprint, event_type, occurred_at, app_name, app_version, user_id, device_id, session_id, page_id, url, title, request_method, request_status, duration, message, selector, resource_type, transport, event_name, payload_json, base_json, create_time FROM monitor_event
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monitor_event ( project_id, issue_id, event_id, issue_type, fingerprint, event_type, occurred_at, app_name, app_version, user_id, device_id, session_id, page_id, url, title, request_method, request_status, duration, message, selector, resource_type, transport, event_name, payload_json, base_json ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{issueId}, #{eventId}, #{issueType}, #{fingerprint}, #{eventType}, #{occurredAt}, #{appName}, #{appVersion}, #{userId}, #{deviceId}, #{sessionId}, #{pageId}, #{url}, #{title}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestStatus}, #{duration}, #{message}, #{selector}, #{resourceType}, #{transport}, #{eventName}, #{payloadJson}, #{baseJson} )
mapper.select: SELECT url, COUNT(1) AS eventCount, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type IN ('js_error', 'promise_rejection', 'console_error', 'resource_error', 'request_error') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS errorCount FROM monitor_event WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND occurred_at >= #{startTime} AND occurred_at <= #{endTime} AND url IS NOT NULL AND url != '' GROUP BY url ORDER BY eventCount DESC, errorCount DESC LIMIT 10
